text:
Once upon a time, in a quiet forest known only to the owls, there lived a curious woodpecker. Every day after breakfast, the woodpecker embarked on adventures through the trees.

One day, the woodpecker discovered something shimmering on the bark of an old oak tree. It was a ruby. Intrigued, the woodpecker pecked harder, revealing a map. The map guided the woodpecker to a hidden cave.

With heart pounding, the woodpecker scuffled through the branches until it reached the cave's entrance. Inside, the cave was filled with gems, jewels, and the most beautiful songs birds could echo. The woodpecker spent days exploring, collecting treasures.

One chilly evening, while admiring its collection, the woodpecker noticed something odd. A glow emanated from one of its prized gems. Curious, it approached. The gem let out a voice.

"Dear woodpecker, I've fallen aside. Use
